sglang.title: Remove vllm dependency in model config
sglang.author: cermeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Remove vllm dependency in model config, part of #2245
Modifications

Copy chatglm and dbrx model config from vllm

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings o

sglang.title: minor: support specifying local dataset path for gsm8k and hellaswag
sglang.author: sleepcoo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix the bug where local datasets gsm8k and hellaswag are not effective.

sglang.title: [Doc] Deepseek reference docs
sglang.author: XiaotongJiang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

#2744
Modifications

Add reference doc for sglangs optimizations for deepseek models
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Override dunder methods of placeholder modules
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables the more informative Please install vllm[...] message to be thrown when using dunder methods of placeholder modules.
FIX #11858

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix beam search input errors and latency benchmark script
vllm.author: yeqcharlotte
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Support latency benchmarking for beam search, which was not added in #9087.
Ran into follow type errors so fixed them too.

[rank0]:   File "/data/users/yeq/gitrepos/vllm/benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py", line 158, in <module>
[rank0]:     main(args

vllm.title: [Doc] Add model development API Reference
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To facilitate upcoming tutorials, this PR adds API Reference pages for model development.

vllm.title: [platform] Allow platform specify attention backend
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #11162
This PR add the ability for platform to implement its own attention backend out-of-tree.

vllm.title: [ci]try to fix flaky multi-step tests
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The test Multi-step Tests (4 GPUs) is found to be quite flaky, e.g. https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/11759#01944a43-2101-4b44-9e06-3c6dc1259452
After investigation, I find the max_wait_seconds=5 * 240 is not respected in the function, max_wait_seconds = 240 * 3  overrides the argument.
In additi

vllm.title: [Misc] Provide correct Pixtral-HF chat template
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The chat template of Pixtral-HF is incorrect when messages[i]["content"] is a dictionary rather than a string, which has been the case in vLLM since #9919. This PR provides a corrected chat template and reminds users to use it.
FIX #11781
FIX #11816

vllm.title: [Docs] Add Modal to deployment frameworks
vllm.author: charlesfrye
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds Modal to the list of deployment frameworks, as discussed in Slack DMs with @mgoin.
The documentation page essentially just links to a page on our docs that explains how to use vLLM on our platform -- so we're the ones on the hook for maintaining the example.
I copied the style of the ot

vllm.title: [Doc][5/N] Move Community and API Reference to the bottom
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR moves the Community and API Reference to the bottom so they are easier to find (no need to search in the middle).
Also, add/updated links related to PagedAttention to refer to the original blog.

vllm.title: [VLM] Enable tokenized inputs for merged multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
By overriding HF's prompt replacement logic with our own, token IDs can now be passed to the merged multi-modal processor.
I have updated #10114 to cover this at a high level.

vllm.title: [Doc] Show default pooling method in a table
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To avoid confusion like in #8740 (comment), this PR emphasizes the default pooling method for each task using a table.
Also, removed unnecessary {code} directives.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Hide KV cache behind torch.compile boundary
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Put kv_cache in forward_context, so that we do not need to pass kv_cache to unified_attention and unified_attention_with_output.
We need this pr to support #9098 (hide continuous batching complexity through forward context) and #11382 (hybrid memory allocator, kv_cache type will be more complex than

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Validate lora adapters to avoid crashing server
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR addresses an issue where loading an invalid lora adapter will crash the engine and shut the server down. This happens because dynamically loaded adapters are first loaded just-in-time, during model execution. Invalid adapters will raise at load time, and any exceptions raised during model ex
